sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n91445" key="pukno/stulos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πυκνό-στῡλος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n91445.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with the pillars close together</tr_>, i.e. at a distance of <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0011.tlg007.perseus-grc1:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1</biblScope> </bibl> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0011.tlg007.perseus-grc1:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1</biblScope> </bibl>/<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0011.tlg007.perseus-grc1:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2</biblScope> </bibl> diameters, opp. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἀραιόστυλος</foreign>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Vitr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.3.1</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
